title: True Attack Indicator
description: True Attack Indicator optimizes the vanilla attack indicator by displaying the correct amount of time between hits which the vanilla attack indicator shows the incorrect amount of time.
body:
True Attack Indicator optimizes the vanilla attack indicator by displaying the correct amount of time between hits which the vanilla attack indicator shows the incorrect amount of time.

If that doesn't make sense than this should: Basically on the vanilla attack indicator, it displays that there is 0.625 seconds between hits, but you can actually perform another hit at roughly 0.54 seconds, or 84.8% of the 0.625 seconds that the attack indicator displays. This mod changes the vanilla attack indicator to show a full bar at roughly 0.54 seconds, making it easier to time your crits, and combo opponents.

If you have any further questions msg me on discord @nottrixxerr

Here is what not having true attack indicator on looks like
